Interface IImageDisplay

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Carto
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Carto.dll

Provides access to the Image Display Interface.

[Guid("725221DE-7D6B-462D-9CDF-1FE22EE39EB6")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IImageDisplay

Properties

DeviceResolution

The device resolution of the image (dots per inch).

double DeviceResolution { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

Height

The height of the image in pixels.

int Height { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

Width

The width of the image in pixels.

int Width { get; set; }
